title: Blown Glass Vase, Unique Blue Vase, Table Centerpiece Vase, Modern Art Vase, Table Centerpiece, Living Room, Wedding, Office Centerpiece Table Display Flowers
features: UNIQUE DESIGN: This hand-blown glass vase is handcrafted by our experienced and skilled artists, and the color on the glass is such that no two pieces are exactly the same. Unique Vase Decorations Display your faux floral collection in vases to showcase your creations as your perfect home decor throughout the year. The large blue transparent vase has an irregular bottle mouth design. In order to accommodate more flowers, people can match flowers with unique vases to achieve the effect they want. After enjoying the process, they can also show exquisite works to the audience, even if there are no flowers. , beautiful vases can also add a pop of color to modern space decor.

Use scene: glass vase is suitable for living room decoration, office, dining room table, office, room, shelf, shop, front desk, bar, cafe, dinner party, hotel, hospitality place, aesthetic course to stimulate students' association or wedding scene to create Bright colors, with different flowers show the perfect home decoration effect.

PERFECT GIFT: Sea blue glass decorative vase is suitable for birthday, mother's day, thanksgiving, new year for female family, friends, elders. For Valentine's Day, Christmas or an anniversary gift, let them create their own collection of beautiful flowers.

Material: The vase is made of blown glass, the bottom is flat, waterproof, and can be used for a long time.
